name: Chicken Tortilla Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (4 oz each) chopped green chiles
1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of chicken soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the chicken, chilies, broth, soups, and onion; set aside.
2. Warm tortillas in the microwave according to package directions.
3. Layer half of the tortillas on the bottom of a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan, cutting to fit if desired.
4. Top with half of the chicken mixture and half of the cheese.
5. Repeat layers.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes.
